name: Legion of Honor
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Minutes / Board of Park Commissioners
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Park Commissioners
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 1925 Park Commissioners minutes recording payments for the Palace, an organist for its dedication, and the city entertaining a delegation at the building.

documents.title: Minutes and Agendas
documents.creator: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco. Board of Trustees
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 2002 Fine Arts Museums trustee minutes placing board meetings and exhibition openings in the Legion of Honor's board room.

documents.title: Annual report
documents.creator: Fine Arts Museums of San Francisco
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The museums' 1970-1971 annual report, naming Ian McKibbin White as director and pressing to restore public bus service to the Legion.

documents.title: Pacific coast architect
documents.matched_alias: California Palace of the Legion of Honor
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1924 architecture journal feature on the California Palace of the Legion of Honor's stucco exterior and its Lincoln Park memorial, gifted to the city by the Spreckels.
